mapper.select: SELECT uf.id, uf.friend_id as friendId, u.username as friendName, u.avatar as avatar, uf.friend_remark as friendRemark, uf.is_star as isStar, uf.create_time as createTime FROM user_friend uf INNER JOIN user u ON uf.friend_id = u.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.friend_status = 1 ORDER BY uf.is_star DESC, uf.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_friend ( user_id, friend_id, friend_group_id, friend_remark, friend_status, is_star, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendId}, #{friendGroupId}, #{friendRemark}, #{friendStatus}, #{isStar}, NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
